title: CommunityBoardApplication
description: An application to serve on one of Staten Island's three community boards — the NET-NEW write surface for this domain. Today this is a Weebly-generated web form (statenislandusa.com/cbapplication.html) that posts to weebly.com/apps/formSubmit.php with opaque field names; there is NO API, NO structured submission endpoint, and NO Open Data twin. This schema gives that intake a clean, machine-readable, agent-fillable contract. On success it becomes a candidate for a CommunityBoardAppointment.

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application number. Omit on create.

residenceAddress.description: The applicant's Staten Island home address (must be a NYC resident of the district or have a compelling interest there).

isResident.description: Applicant certifies they live, work, or have a significant interest in the community district.

areasOfInterest.description: Policy areas of interest (land use, transportation, parks, etc.).

priorBoardService.description: Has the applicant served on a board before.

statementOfInterest.description: Why the applicant wants to serve.

status.description: Set by the office, not the applicant.
